data.current_summary: Return a full list of laws and incentives that match your query.
data.summary_suggestion: Query laws and incentives by criteria
data.description_suggestion: Searches the Transportation Laws and Incentives database for federal and state laws, regulations, and incentives matching specified criteria. Accepts filters for jurisdiction (state/local), law type (State Incentives, Laws and Regulations, Utility/Private Incentives), category (alternative fuels, air quality, fuel efficiency, etc.), and other parameters. Returns a paginated list of matching laws with full details including descriptions, references, and applicable categories. Supports JSON and XML output formats.

data.current_summary: Return the law categories for a given category type.
data.summary_suggestion: List available law categories by type
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all available law categories for a specified category type. Category types include Infrastructure Requirements, Vehicle Requirements, and other transportation-related classifications. Accepts optional jurisdiction filters (state/local). Returns a structured list of categories with identifiers and descriptions that can be used to filter laws and incentives in other API operations. Supports JSON and XML output formats.

data.current_summary: Get the points of contact for a given jurisdiction.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves points of contact (POCs) for laws and incentives administrators in a specified jurisdiction. Accepts jurisdiction parameters (state and optional local/county identifiers). Returns contact details including names, titles, organizations, phone numbers, emails, and websites for relevant government agencies and administrators responsible for transportation laws and incentives in that jurisdiction. Supports JSON and XML output formats.

data.current_summary: Fetch the details of a specific law given the law's ID.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve complete law details by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive details for a specific law, regulation, or incentive using its unique identifier. Returns the complete Law object including description, law type (State Incentive, Law/Regulation, or Utility/Private Incentive), applicable categories, jurisdiction, effective dates, references to legislative bills, and related metadata. Supports JSON and XML output formats. Use this operation after identifying a law ID from search results to obtain full details.
